creator: Ferruccio De Martino
description: Hercules returns to Thebes to find the land on the brink of civil war. While trying to deliver a treaty to prevent the war, Hercules drinks from the fountain of forgetfulness and is seduced by the evil Omphale. An AVI of this movie is available here on the archive . You can find out more about this movie on its IMDB page .
